description_long: This street light features a tall, slender, dark-colored pole with a hexagonal lantern-style lamp head at the top. The lamp head is enclosed with translucent panels and is topped with decorative finials, giving it a classic, vintage appearance. The base of the pole is robust and faceted, providing stability and a touch of ornamental design, with small tufts of grass visible around it. The lamp head is supported directly by the pole, with no horizontal arms, and the light is diffused through the frosted panels. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional Victorian or Edwardian street lamps, often found in parks, historic neighborhoods, or along pedestrian pathways. The materials appear to be primarily metal for the pole and frame, with glass or acrylic for the lamp panels.
description: A tall, classic lantern-style street light with a hexagonal lamp head, decorative finials, and a sturdy faceted base. The pole is dark and slender, with frosted panels diffusing the light.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical hexagonal lamp head, decorative finials, and the full height of the slender pole with a faceted base.
description_view_1: Angled view revealing the depth of the lamp head, the faceted base, and some small tufts of grass at the base.
description_view_2: Rear view highlighting the even distribution of the lamp head panels and the robust, geometric base.
description_view_3: Side view showing the profile of the lamp head, the straight pole, and the ornamental base with visible grass tufts.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Hexagonal lantern-style with frosted translucent panels, decorative finials on top, and a classic vintage appearance.
